opinions.title: I WILL NOT BE STUBBORN AGAIN
opinions.body:
I have been a stubborn naughty little baby, i promise not too be stubborn again from today. I will not argue with Dr Baby again and i will be a good litle baby for my Dr Baby

signed
DBB

opinions.title: How To Be A Bad Girl- Baddie101
opinions.body: Well, being a baddie requires 3 things. 1; you must come from Kaduna. 2; you must recognize who i am. 3; If you dont geraraaaaherrreeee now..

opinions.title: React-Practice
opinions.body: I am learning to love react gradually and i think it is a cool library

opinions.title: Do yourself a favor and learn React!
opinions.body:
React is an amazing JavaScript library!

Despite all it's shortcomings.

opinions.title: React has more depth than you might first think!
opinions.body:
React is a great library to learn, but it's not just about the basics. Dive deeper!
For example with this course!
